title: Knowledge base: distribution board requires RCD protection
notes: KB-DRIVEN ITEM ADDITION. The customer asks only for an enclosure, but the 'Instalacja i kompatybilność' space states every supplied board must ship with a 30mA Type-A RCD. The agent should add RCD-25-30-2P and cite the article. Likely a GAP today: current agents rarely add a product the request never mentions, so item recall will sit near 0.5 until that lands — a roadmap metric. The forbidden HR article also mentions 'różnicowoprądowe', so it adversarially tempts retrieval and must not be cited.

customer.name: Dom-Instal Mateusz Kowalski
customer.profile: Residential electrician fitting out apartments; orders boards per flat.

request: Dzień dobry, poproszę rozdzielnicę podtynkową 24-modułową do mieszkania.
